LanguageData.ME_FMJ.label: Acccelerator slug
LanguageData.ME_FMJ.description: Minature pellets generated from a weapon's internal ammunition block, which are first reduced to near weightlessness by a mass effect field and then propelled to lethal speed by magnetic forces.
LanguageData.ME_AP.label: Armor-Piercing acccelerator slug
LanguageData.ME_AP.description: Features a hardened tungsten carbide penetrator core for increased armor penetration. Causes less internal tissue damage.
LanguageData.ME_Cryo.label: Cryo acccelerator slug
LanguageData.ME_Cryo.description: Filled with cryogenic agents that freezes your enemies in place upon impact.
LanguageData.ME_HE.label: High Explosive acccelerator slug
LanguageData.ME_HE.description: Filled with high explosive agent that detonate upon impact.
LanguageData.ME_FI.label: Incendiary
LanguageData.ME_FI.description: Filled with incendiary agent that ignites after impact.
LanguageData.ME_Ion.label: Disruptor
LanguageData.ME_Ion.description: Designed to combat mechanoids and shielding, the round creates an electrical current on impact, disrupting electronic systems temporarily.
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.label: Toxin
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.description: Designed to combat organic targets, injects the target with a painful neuratoxin upon penetration. Inflicts extreme nausea and neuro paralysis to the victim.
